darkMode.label: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: enable dark theme appearance for better readability in low light

colorScheme.label: Color Scheme
colorScheme.description: choose the color theme for the interface

customCSS.label: Custom CSS
customCSS.description: add your own css styles to customize the appearance

fileView.label: File View
fileView.description: choose how files are displayed - detailed shows metadata, compact saves space, reader optimizes for reading

fontFamily.label: Font Family
fontFamily.description: select the font style for text display

sidebarMetadata.label: Show Metadata
sidebarMetadata.description: display file metadata information in the sidebar

sidebarConnections.label: Show Connections
sidebarConnections.description: display linked files and connections in the sidebar

sidebarReferences.label: Show References
sidebarReferences.description: display external references and resource links in the sidebar

sidebarToc.label: Show Table of Contents
sidebarToc.description: show document outline and table of contents

sidebarVersionHistory.label: Show Version History
sidebarVersionHistory.description: display file version history and changes

linkDisplayMode.label: Link Display Mode
linkDisplayMode.description: show filenames, file paths, or extracted titles in links

searchResultsDisplay.label: Search Results Display
searchResultsDisplay.description: choose how search results are displayed - list shows compact links, cards show detailed previews

mediaLinkMode.label: Media Link Mode
mediaLinkMode.description: direct opens raw media file, detail shows metadata and usage information

compactMetadataPath.label: Compact: Path
compactMetadataPath.description: show the file path in the compact file list row

compactMetadataEdited.label: Compact: Last Edited
compactMetadataEdited.description: show the last-edited timestamp in the compact file list row

compactMetadataCreated.label: Compact: Created
compactMetadataCreated.description: show the creation date in the compact file list row

compactMetadataCollection.label: Compact: Collection
compactMetadataCollection.description: show the collection name in the compact file list row

compactMetadataTags.label: Compact: Tags
compactMetadataTags.description: show tags in the compact file list row

compactMetadataFolders.label: Compact: Folders
compactMetadataFolders.description: show the folder path in the compact file list row

compactMetadataAncestors.label: Compact: Ancestors
compactMetadataAncestors.description: show ancestor files (files this file is nested under) in the compact row

compactMetadataParents.label: Compact: Parents
compactMetadataParents.description: show direct parent files in the compact file list row

compactMetadataChildren.label: Compact: Children
compactMetadataChildren.description: show direct child files in the compact file list row

compactMetadataLinksTo.label: Compact: Links To
compactMetadataLinksTo.description: show files this file links to in the compact file list row

compactMetadataLinksFrom.label: Compact: Links From
compactMetadataLinksFrom.description: show files that link to this file (backlinks) in the compact file list row

compactMetadataRelated.label: Compact: Related
compactMetadataRelated.description: show related files (shared tags or connections) in the compact file list row

headerLink1.label: Header Link 1
headerLink1.description: first link shown in the header navigation bar

headerLink2.label: Header Link 2
headerLink2.description: second link shown in the header navigation bar

headerLink3.label: Header Link 3
headerLink3.description: third link shown in the header navigation bar

headerLink4.label: Header Link 4
headerLink4.description: fourth link shown in the header navigation bar

headerLink5.label: Header Link 5
headerLink5.description: fifth link shown in the header navigation bar
